properties.name: disabled
properties.description: Whether the Color Picker's element is disabled

properties.name: disable-saved-colors
properties.description: Disables the saving color swatches feature

properties.name: error-text
properties.description: The error text for the form element

properties.name: helper-text
properties.description: The helper text for the form element

properties.name: max-swatches
properties.description: Limits number of swatches that can be saved

properties.name: open
properties.description: Sets the open state of the Color Picker's popup

properties.name: placeholder
properties.description: Text that appears in the input element when it has no value set

properties.name: required
properties.description: A value is required for the form to be submittable

properties.name: saved-colors-key
properties.description: Sets the localStorage key used to store saved colors explicitly

properties.name: success-text
properties.description: The success text for the form element

properties.name: swatches
properties.description: Sets a color palette from which users can select colors

properties.name: value
properties.description: The value of the element. When specified in the HTML, corresponds to the initial value

slots.name: contextual-help
slots.description: Allows you to add the [Contextual Help](/components/contextual-help/) component to be displayed next to the label.

slots.name: helper-text
slots.description: Add rich content as the Color Picker's helper text.

slots.name: popup-text
slots.description: Overrides the default "Color Picker" title of the Popup window.

slots.name: swatches-text
slots.description: Overrides the default "Saved colors:" text above color swatches.
